title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・“覇王”を睨む目

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O crosses the finish! Even under all
that pressure, she never yielded!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We just witnessed true majesty here at Yodo this
spring!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, hehehe... Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I performed stunningly in the spring Tenno Sho.
None shall ever make light of me again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching, predecessors? And you,
Meisho Doto?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Here I stand! The throne of the Centurial
Overlord is mine for the taking!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Did you see me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Good, you mustn't miss a beat. I need you as my
historian to immortalize each and every one of my
achievements for the masses.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Burn the entirety of my glorious form into those
eyes of yours! Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass, that runnin' of hers...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes. Her intensity has grown fiercer than ever.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Opera O is so incredible... It's frightening.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll be able to keep my promise and race in
the Takarazuka Kinen, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do I even stand a chance? Ohhh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: There is nothing to fear, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeeep?! What're you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without the slightest hesitation, Opera leaps
over the barrier and into the stands.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am strong. Therefore, you needn't fear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Like the star I am, I only deal with feelings
straight as they come, pure and simple.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have the desire to race me, to cross
metaphorical blades, do you not?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then steel yourself now and face me with fullest
might at the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O... You really believe in me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... Yes! I'll... take you up on that!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And there you have it, Trainer! Our next race will
be the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall accept Doto's challenge before the battle
against the older generation begins in earnest.
Haaah hah hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's left her mark on the Tenno Sho,
it's time to prepare for the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I thought everything was going smoothly, but...

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That T.M. Opera O sure does whatever the heck
she pleases.

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I thought she was just getting lucky at
first... but maybe she's actually a threat?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The real battle starts now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who didn't understand her strength had
written her off as arrogant until now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No one can deny it anymore. She's made sure of
that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will be taking her seriously from here
on.
choice_data_list: That means she's got more marks on her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, now many racers will be devising strategies
in order to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They may even work together to prevent her from
finishing first.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It was the same for Spe, El, and myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We found a way to break through and overcame
it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The question now is if Opera O can do the same.
Those who stand out become a large target.
